title: aspidium lessonii
intro: Aspidium lessonii, also known as the Asplenium lessonii, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, commonly known as ferns. The medicinal properties of Aspidium lessonii include its ability to reduce fever and inflammation, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Aspidium lessonii include its potential to improve digestion, reduce blood sugar levels, and act as an antiseptic, while herbal preparations often involve drying and powdering the leaves for use in teas or capsules.
